mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM preference.user_place_reactions WHERE reaction IN ('LIKE', 'SUPER_LIKE')

SELECT CAST(tag.tag_id AS text) AS tag_id, count(*) FILTER (WHERE reaction.reaction IN ('LIKE', 'SUPER_LIKE')) AS positive_count, count(*) AS reaction_count FROM preference.user_place_reactions reaction JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT enrichment.id FROM preference.place_tag_enrichments enrichment WHERE enrichment.status = 'SUCCEEDED' AND ( enrichment.id = reaction.place_tag_enrichment_id OR ( enrichment.provider = reaction.provider AND enrichment.external_place_id = reaction.external_place_id ) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN enrichment.id = reaction.place_tag_enrichment_id THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, enrichment.enriched_at DESC NULLS LAST, enrichment.created_at DESC, enrichment.id LIMIT 1 ) selected_enrichment ON true JOIN preference.place_tag_enrichment_tags tag ON tag.enrichment_id = selected_enrichment.id GROUP BY tag.tag_id ORDER BY tag.tag_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO preference.tag_statistic_runs ( id, source, status, alpha, global_positive_rate, total_reaction_count, positive_reaction_count, is_serving, started_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), 'REAL_USER', 'RUNNING', #{alpha}, #{globalPositiveRate}, #{totalReactionCount}, #{positiveReactionCount}, false, now() )

INSERT INTO preference.tag_statistics ( run_id, tag_id, preference_discrimination, smoothed_positive_rate, positive_count, reaction_count ) VALUES ( CAST(#{runId} AS uuid), CAST(#{tagId} AS uuid), #{preferenceDiscrimination}, #{smoothedPositiveRate}, #{positiveCount}, #{reactionCount} )
mapper.update: UPDATE preference.tag_statistic_runs SET is_serving = false WHERE is_serving = true
UPDATE preference.tag_statistic_runs SET status = 'SUCCEEDED', is_serving = true, completed_at = now() WHERE id = CAST(#{runId} AS uuid)
